expectations.evidence: useNotificationFilter hook implements all/unread filter with NotificationFilterType union; NotificationList.tsx uses filter state to switch between all and unread notifications
fetch('/api/notifications') is still called directly in useEffect inside NotificationList.tsx; useNotificationFilter.ts only handles filter logic, not the fetch
useNotificationFilter does not follow use{Verb}{Resource} — 'Notification' is the resource and 'Filter' is the verb, so it is use{Resource}{Verb} order instead
data-testid='notifications-empty' element renders when filteredNotifications.length === 0 in NotificationList.tsx line 111
Error check at line 65 returns early with data-testid='notifications-error' before any filter UI is rendered
The test ID used is 'filter-all' (line 98), not 'notifications-filter-all' as required
The test ID used is 'filter-unread' (line 98 via template), not 'notifications-filter-unread' as required
handleRetry function at line 34 and handleSetFilter in useNotificationFilter.ts line 44 use handle prefix
